title: ProgressionDungeonRW
description: Replayable dungeon runs with modular generation—built for RPG progression and reward loops.
body:
# ProgressionDungeonRW

ProgressionDungeonRW adds instanced dungeons that are freshly assembled each run. Built from WorldEdit schematics and generated inside dedicated void instances, every dungeon feels different — ideal for repeatable runs, farming, and group content. Entry is simple via dungeon plates: teleport in, clear the run, grab the loot, and get out.

It also includes a party system for 1–10 players to start together and handle coordinated teleports. Loot tables and dungeon mobs are configurable, and features like fake portals/portal walls plus a radar map (FILLED_MAP) boost both navigation and atmosphere. On top of that, you get a Sunflower coin system with a coin-pouch GUI and auto-pickup, integrated with ProgressionAPI/ProgressionEconomy and WorldEdit.


# Highlights:

Modular/procedural dungeon generation for replayability

Built for reward loops (loot/progression/economy hooks)

Perfect for parties, events, and long-term content plans

Fits MMO-style server design (content-first gameplay)

Perfect for: dungeon servers, RPG/MMO networks, progression content.

# Why you’ll love it

Players log in “just for one more run”

Dungeons stay fresh thanks to modular generation

Perfect for party content, events, and endgame loops

# Features

Modular/procedural dungeon generation

Built for rewards: loot/progression/economy hooks

Designed for repeatable content and group play

Fits MMO-style server design

# Setup

Install the plugin

Configure dungeon modules/loot/reward loops

Connect to quests/shops/items if used

Test generation + run pacing

# Compatibility

Platform: Paper (recommended)

Best with: Progression + Quest + Shop + custom items
